name: Tom's Death by Basil Mayonnaise
recipeInstructions:
1. Collect the basil and wash it thoroughly, removing any leaves as needed. Allow to dry.
2. Measure 1/2 cup of fresh basil using a measuring cup or spoon; pack it firmly into the measure.
3. Remove the stems and seeds from the habanero peppers carefully.
4. Place the minced basil, habaneros, and garlic in a food processor and pulse until finely chopped.
5. Mix the purée with low-fat mayonnaise (such as Hellmans) until well combined.
6. Refrigerate for at least 2 days to allow flavors to develop before using.
7. Store in an airtight container or jar.
The basil flavor is dominant, with just enough heat from the peppers to provide a subtle kick. This sauce pairs well with various sandwiches and adds a touch of spice.
